videos.title: The Semantic Model Became the Product — Here’s Why Power BI Is Changing
videos.description:
What if the most important thing in Power BI… isn’t the report anymore?

In this video, Patrick walks through a modern Microsoft Fabric and Power BI solution to show why semantic models are becoming the real analytical product.

Using a hospitality analytics scenario built in Microsoft Fabric, we explore how:

 - Semantic models centralize business meaning
 - Field parameters create dynamic report experiences
 - Reusable measures and metadata power modern analytics
 - Copilot and AI depend on se

videos.title: Amplifying Greatness with AI
videos.description:
Can AI make you 30x more valuable?

If you're already amazing at your job, AI can amplify your skills exponentially! But what happens when someone less skilled uses AI to outshine you? Discover why understanding AI is crucial for everyone, even the best of the best.

Don't let others outpace you—invest in AI and stay ahead!

#AI #CareerGrowth #SkillAmplification

From Azure to GitHub Copilot, we're empowering builders everywhere.

Full conversation on the channel.

#AI #AgentCon #TechEvents

videos.title: The Annual AI Slowdown Panic Is Here
videos.description:
DataCurve's DeepSWE benchmark exposes large performance gaps on realistic, long-horizon coding tasks. Summer AI slowdown panic returns alongside renewed debate over job displacement and deployment frictions. Token shortages and massive inference funding for Base10 and OpenRouter push the market toward pay-per-use pricing and constrain agent experimentation and equitable access.

The AI Daily Brief helps you understand the most important news and discussions in AI.

videos.title: I Built a Social Media Carousel Generator With Claude Code
videos.description:
Grab this system today: https://skool.com/scrapes

Most AI-generated carousels are just AI slop. They lack brand continuity, have no visual hierarchy, and fail to engage. In this video, I reveal the system I built to solve this. I'll show you how to go from a simple topic or blog post to a fully polished, on-brand carousel that feels authentic to your brand. We'll look at the system running live and break down the core concepts that make it work, so you can build your own.

Watch the full video

videos.title: Gemini Spark Is Here: Full Breakdown and Use Cases
videos.description:
Gemini Spark is Google's new 24/7 AI agent that handles your inbox, calendar, and busy work with almost zero setup — here's how to get it running and put it to work today.

Current Availability: Spark is rolling out. It's currently only available for Google AI Ultra subscribers.

🔗 This video is not sponsored but I did receive early access to Spark as part of the Google Early Access Program.

0:31 Finding Spark
1:14 Setup
2:30 Your First Task
5:53 Skills & Schedules
